title: Do not unmarshal into c.config.Spec
body:
We try to keep c.config immutable, but Go doesn't really agree with me that things other than strings and ints can be immutable, so occasionally things like this slip through.

When unmarshalling the OCI spec from disk, do it into a separate struct, to ensure we don't make lasting modifications to the spec in the Container struct (which could affect container restart).

comments.body: @baude This ought to fix your inspect issues
